new_claims.claim_text: Senator Mark Kelly stated that white men have no business in the military or NASA and are a disaster.

new_claims.claim_text: Taxpayers do not receive any money, while every country, organization, terrorist group, board, college, agency, and political leader has received taxpayer money.
